assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Identify the CyberArk-wide first-mile product surface and complete its documented first success from a cold start.

first_success.outcome: If Conjur OSS demo is selected, BotApp retrieves the stored secret and shows the quickstart congratulations message.
first_success.observable_signal: /tmp/program.sh displays the stored secret and the repository congratulations text appears.

route_selection.surface: CyberArk Conjur OSS Docker Compose demo versus commercial CyberArk product onboarding
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Conjur OSS Docker Compose store-and-retrieve demo
candidates.reason: Official quickstart is demo-only and may not represent commercial CyberArk first mile.

candidates.name: Commercial CyberArk Identity Security Platform self-service route
candidates.reason: No single public self-service first-success path was established as the product-neutral CyberArk default from current sources.

required_path.action: Clone the Conjur quickstart repository and accept its demo-only scope, if that route is selected.
Start the Docker Compose demo environment and follow policy, secret store, and BotApp steps.

required_fields.label: Docker Compose and demo script commands

required_path.observable_result: BotApp retrieves the secret and congratulations text appears.

prerequisites.description: Docker with Docker Compose is required for the Conjur OSS demo route.

unavoidable_waits.description: Container image pulls and demo service startup.

platform_outcomes.description: Conjur OSS stores and returns the demo secret to BotApp.

excluded.item: Using the demo for production Conjur deployment
excluded.reason: Repository explicitly forbids production use of this quickstart.

uncertainties.question: Should a CyberArk-wide first mile use Conjur OSS demo or a current commercial product surface?
uncertainties.impact: Product boundary changes whether account creation, sales entitlement, or local Docker is in path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official CyberArk developer getting-started entry that names one self-service first success for this corpus slug.

uncertainties.question: What exact Compose and script commands are required on a fresh machine today?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Re-run the current repository README steps and capture each required command.
